---
title: Fourth Wing
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1757411611/fourthwing_lsuvhm.png
description: Illustration de Violet, Fourth Wing
categories: [fanart]
date: 2024-05-01
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1757411611/fourthwing_lsuvhm.png)

::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
